summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Schedule A enhancements: Accept Property template with auto-add to Schedule A, Dispose/Sell Asset template with asset selection, and Schedule A status filtering. All backend APIs and frontend UI features verified working correctly.

issues: React warning about <tr>/<span> nesting in table - cosmetic issue, non-blocking

backend_api: GET /api/template-options - Returns disposition_of_asset template with correct name and icon
GET /api/schedule-a?status=active - Filters to show only active assets
GET /api/schedule-a?status=all - Shows all assets including disposed
POST /api/minutes-templates (acceptance_of_property) - Creates asset in Schedule A with minutes_ref when add_to_schedule_a=true
POST /api/minutes-templates (disposition_of_asset) - Marks asset as disposed with disposition_minutes_ref when update_schedule_a=true
Schedule A items include status, minutes_ref, disposition_minutes_ref, disposition_date, disposition_notes fields
Disposition template generates proper legal WHEREAS/RESOLVED content
frontend_ui: Minutes Templates page shows 'Dispose / Sell Asset' option with MinusCircle icon
Accept Property template form shows Identifier field (VIN, Account #, Legal Description)
Accept Property template form shows Location/Institution field
'Automatically add to Schedule A' checkbox present and checked by default
Asset Category dropdown appears when 'Add to Schedule A' is checked
Disposition template shows 'Select Asset from Schedule A' dropdown
Disposition template loads active assets from Schedule A for selection
Schedule A page shows 'Show disposed assets' checkbox
Schedule A table includes Status column
Status column shows Active/Disposed badges with correct styling
Toggle 'Show disposed assets' reveals/hides historical disposed assets

critical_code_review_comments: Backend properly implements disposition_of_asset template type in MinutesTemplateType enum
Schedule A GET endpoint correctly handles status parameter with backward compatibility for legacy items without status field
Asset creation from accept_property template correctly sets minutes_ref to link asset to creating minutes
Asset disposition correctly updates status='disposed', disposition_minutes_ref, disposition_date, disposition_notes
Frontend MinutesTemplateFormPage.js correctly manages dispositionData state and loadScheduleAAssets function
ScheduleAPage.js properly implements showDisposed state toggle and Status column rendering
seed_data_creation: Test created temporary assets prefixed with 'TEST' for disposition testing - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Schedule A enhancement features verified: 1) Accept Property template creates Schedule A entries with minutes_ref when add_to_schedule_a=true, 2) Disposition template loads active assets and marks them disposed with disposition_minutes_ref when update_schedule_a=true, 3) Schedule A page has status filter toggle and Status column showing Active/Disposed badges, 4) Minutes reference columns show which minutes added/disposed each asset. The React <tr>/<span> warning in ScheduleAPage is cosmetic and does not affect functionality.

accept_property_template.add_to_schedule_a_checkbox: Checked by default, when true creates Schedule A entry with minutes_ref
accept_property_template.schedule_a_creation: Asset created with category, description, identifier, location, value, date_conveyed, minutes_ref

disposition_template.asset_selection: Loads active Schedule A assets via GET /api/schedule-a?status=active
disposition_template.update_schedule_a_checkbox: When true, marks asset as disposed with disposition_minutes_ref
disposition_template.generated_content: Includes WHEREAS/RESOLVED clauses with sale/transfer/donation language

schedule_a_page.show_disposed_toggle: Checkbox to show/hide disposed assets (status=all vs status=active)
schedule_a_page.minutes_ref_display: Shows 'Added via Minutes: {ref}' for assets created from templates
schedule_a_page.disposition_ref_display: Shows 'Disposed via Minutes: {ref} on {date}' for disposed assets
